CustomField.description:
Auto-populated from Escalation section on Lease page, can be edited if assembly escalation is different than general escalation Month.
When Supplement rent record is created or update then 1. When creating Rates Schedule( MR Rate) records then we are using this field value in calculation under supplement rent record. 2. We are not populating this field value with Lease field(Escalation Month) value. But in the past, we were populating it with lease field because code is commented Using this feild on Supplement Rent Utilization calculation- 1. We are using this field value in MR calculation on supplement rent utilization Using this field in Forecast backend code - 1. If Escalation Month field is not blank on supplement record then When creating Fx Component Output record then populating "MR_Escalation_Month" field value with month number respective to Escalation Month value on supplement rent record
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto-populated from Escalation section on Lease page, can be edited if assembly escalation is different than general escalation Month.
CustomField.label: Escalation Month
